tags_v2.setting: styled tabletop with fall decor against white wall

seconds_v2.desc: Close-up of two glossy red glass taper candlestick holders holding white candles, on a round wooden riser with dried fall leaves behind.
Same pair of red glass candle holders with white tapers; camera begins easing back, dried cream and brown leaves filling the background.
Two red glass candleholders with unlit white taper candles, dried autumn leaves draped around the wooden riser.
Continued slow zoom-out on the red glass holders and white tapers staged with fall foliage.
Wider view of the red candlestick holders and white candles; an orange pumpkin and string lights now visible at right among the leaves.
The two white taper candles are now lit (flameless LED glow), red holders on the wooden riser framed by fall leaves and a pumpkin.
Lit white taper candles in the red glass holders, full autumn styling with leaves, string lights and stacked orange pumpkins.
Decor shot of the glowing white tapers in red holders centered on the wood riser, fall leaves and pumpkins surrounding.
Final staged reveal: two lit white taper candles in red glass candlestick holders on a wooden riser amid autumn leaves and pumpkins.

windows.embed_text_v2: flameless LED pillar candle glowing as a wall-outlet night light in a dark room, then dim kitchen backsplash with two lit candles above a stovetop, pumpkin and Halloween witch cauldron decor
windows.summary_v2: A flameless LED candle used as a wall night light glows in the dark, then a wider shot shows two of them lighting a kitchen backsplash with Halloween decor.

tags_v2.action: displaying flameless candle as night light

seconds_v2.desc: Close-up in a dark room of a glowing white flameless LED pillar candle seated in a holder plugged into a wall outlet, acting as a night light.
Same warm-glowing flameless LED candle in its outlet night-light base against a tiled wall, dim surroundings.
The lit white LED candle night light continues glowing softly from the wall socket in the dark.
Slightly blurred close-up of the glowing white flameless candle plugged into the outlet.
The white LED candle night light glows against the tile; a faint blue device light appears at lower left.
Warm white flameless candle still lit in its wall-outlet base, dark room around it.
Tight shot of the glowing white LED pillar candle in the outlet night-light holder.
Final close framing of the lit flameless candle night light glowing on the wall.
Camera cuts to a wider dark kitchen: two of the flameless candles glow on the backsplash above a stovetop, with a pumpkin and Halloween witch-cauldron decor on the counter.

tags_v2.setting: styled tabletop with fall decor against white wall

seconds_v2.desc: Close-up of a finished candle in a white bowl: pale wax surface studded with translucent orange gel chunks and gold metallic pumpkin charms.
Same decorated candle bowl, the white wax top scattered with orange gel pieces and gold pumpkin accents, viewed slightly closer.
Tight overhead-ish view of the orange and gold pumpkin decorations embedded in the white candle wax.
The decorated white-wax candle in the bowl, orange gem-like chunks and gold pumpkins across its surface.
Continued close view of the finished pumpkin-themed candle surface in the white bowl.
Camera pulls back: the candle sits in a white marble bowl on a grey book riser, a white pumpkin and orange pumpkin garland appearing at the sides.
Wider shot of the finished marble-bowl candle staged with a white pumpkin, fall pumpkin garland and a framed silhouette behind.
Decor framing of the orange-and-gold pumpkin candle in the marble bowl amid autumn styling.
